era_context: Late Old Kingdom Egypt (Dynasty VI), Akkadian Empire (Naram-Sin), mature Harappan civilization. Continuation of the mid-third millennium BCE Bronze Age world.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No events are documented for this year.
historiographic_note: The historical record for -2361 is essentially blank. No specific events, inscriptions, or records are known to date to this particular year. The year falls within the reign of Pepi II and Naram-Sin, but no year-specific documentation survives. This reflects the general sparseness of ancient historical records and the difficulty of assigning events to specific years in the mid-third millennium BCE.
